query: What are the fees associated with each milestone in the ERCOT generation interconnection process?
final_answer:
Short answer: ERCOT charges a set of application/study deposits and administrative fees tied to the GINR (Generation Interconnection or Change Request) milestones, but the exact dollar amounts are published in ERCOT’s Fee Schedule (in the Protocols) and can change over time. Below I list the common milestones and the typical fees (types) you will encounter and where to get the current amounts.

Common milestones and associated fees (types — check ERCOT Fee Schedule for current $ amounts)
- Initial application / GINR submission
  - Application fee (small generation) or registration/application processing fee
  - May require an initial administrative payment method (online or other)
- Screening Study (Security Screening Study)
  - Screening study deposit / study fee (covers ERCOT and TSP screening work)
- Full Interconnection Study (FIS) / System Impact Study
  - FIS / System Impact Study deposit (ERCOT + Transmission/Distribution Service Provider study costs)
  - Additional hourly study charges can be assessed if work exceeds deposit
- Facility Study (sometimes part of or following FIS)
  - Facility Study deposit / fee to cover detailed design/costing by TSP/DSP
- Reactive power / protection / stability studies (as applicable)
  - Separately billed study fees or charged against study deposits
- Resource registration / modeling / registration data submission
  - Resource Entity (RE) registration fees or administrative fees (if applicable)
- Commissioning / Energization milestone
  - Commissioning review / energization processing fee (and any required test witness charges)
- Telemetry / settlement metering setup
  - Metering/telemetry installation and site inspection charges (TSP/DSP/third‑party costs; ERCOT may have administrative fees)
- Interconnection Agreement / QSA / cost allocation steps
  - No single “fee” in all cases, but TDSP/TSP construction costs, milestone invoices, and any required security deposits or escrow payments are billed per the agreement
- If ERCOT/TSP performs additional work (e.g., modeling corrections, out‑of‑scope requests)
  - Additional fees billed at ERCOT/TSP hourly rates or per the Fee Schedule

Where to get exact/current dollar amounts
- ERCOT Fee Schedule in the ERCOT Protocols (the Protocols contain the official Fee Schedule and charge table). See ERCOT’s Resource Integration / Interconnection pages and the Planning Guide (Section 5) for descriptions of the milestones and references to the Fee Schedule:
  - ERCOT Resource Integration page: https://www.ercot.com/services/rq/integration
  - ERCOT Planning Guide (Section 5 — Generator Interconnection or Modification): https://www.ercot.com/mktrules/guides/planning/current
  - The Fee Schedule is referenced from those pages and is part of the Protocols; ERCOT publishes protocol/fee updates that show the current amounts.

If you want, I can:
- Retrieve the current ERCOT Fee Schedule and extract the dollar amounts for each specific milestone (application fee, screening study deposit, FIS deposit, facility study deposit, commissioning fee, etc.) and produce a table of current charges.

tool_input.query: ERCOT generation interconnection process fees milestone deposit application fee feasibility system impact facilities study cluster study deposit 'interconnection fee' 'ERCOT' 'milestone'
"ERCOT Fee Schedule" interconnection application fee GINR screening study deposit facilities study deposit "interconnection fee schedule" "Planning Guide" "Generation Interconnection" fee

"Fee Schedule" "Generation Interconnection" ERCOT fee application GINR screening deposit 'security deposit' 'Facility Study' 'System Impact Study' 'application fee' 'Screening Study' 'FIS fee' 'QSA' 'commissioning fee'
